DP.360.0000:
Reporter: Hello! The time for
Discovering Groups is upon us.\f
Today, we dropped in to check up on
the Trainer [0103,0000].\f
[0103,0000] is a member of the
group [013D,0001].\f
Oh, that must be [0103,0000]
over there.\f
[0103,0000] is obviously enjoying
being a member of the group.\f
It’s like [0103,0000] has found
a second home!\f
If I had to describe this group,
in my uninformed, subjective view,\r
it would be the [010F,0002] type?\f
Please look forward to the next
show!
DP.360.0001:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
[0104,0000] is blessed with
cloudless skies!\f
I would like to take this opportunity
to do my piled-up laundry!\f
It will be nice to dry them under
the sun here!\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0002:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
[0104,0000] is under clear
skies!\f
It’s the perfect sort of day to
go cycling.\f
If you were to crash into a stream,
you’d dry off quickly today!\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0003:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
It’s nothing but blue skies over
[0104,0000]!\f
It would be a shame to spend a day
like this cooped up indoors.\f
Why not step outside and bask under
the sun?\f
Why not amuse yourself with a solo
whistling performance?\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0004:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
There isn’t a cloud in the sky above
[0104,0000]!\f
It’s the sort of day that’s ideal
for having your picture taken.\f
Everyone looks prettier under
the smiling sun!\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0005:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
[0104,0000] is under gloomy
clouds.\f
But watch out!
Don’t be fooled by the sun’s absence.\f
It’s days like this that you can get
sunburned!\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0006:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
[0104,0000] is getting doused
by rain.\f
It’s the sort of weather that’s right
for enjoying music at home.\f
Maybe have some tea and gaze at
the rain-covered plants.\f
Perhaps you can giggle at people
running to avoid the downpour.\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0007:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
A steady downpour continues to
fall on [0104,0000]!\f
This is your chance to shout your
loved one’s name to the skies!\f
Forget about an umbrella!
Think of the dramatic possibilities!\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0008:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
It’s cold!
Snow is falling on [0104,0000]!\f
I would like to not act my age and
try to charm you with my cuteness...\f
But it’s too cold for me to be
frolicking!\f
I’m heading home right after this
to curl up with my CLEFAIRY.\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0009:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
[0104,0000] is taking cover
in a blizzard!\f
Some of you may brave the weather
in hopes of finding rare Pokémon\r
under these extreme conditions.\f
Be sure to dress extra warm, and
don’t fall asleep!\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0010:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
A-as y-you c-can see...\f
[0104,0000] is besieged by 
a howling blizzard!\f
My hair, even in my nostrils,
is caked with ice!\f
I’m grateful for having the sense to
buy a new coat with my bonus!\f
But even under these brutal
conditions, there are Trainers about!\f
I think they are foolish, and yet
I can’t help but respect them.\f
...May I please go inside now?\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0011:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weath...\f
Giyaaaah!
Thunder!\f
There is a thunderstorm over
[0104,0000]!\f
It’s...
Giyaaaaaah!\f
That camera’s like a lightning rod!
Let’s finish this now!\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0012:
Helena: This is Helena bringing you
on-the-spot weather!\f
Today, we bring you a sight you
very rarely get to see.\f
Diamond dust is visible in the sky
above [0104,0000].\f
The glittery cloud of ice is
fantastically beautiful.\f
Couples should step out for a truly
magical and romantic experience.\f
Every girl can be a princess
on a day like this.\f
Guys, there’s no better setting
to propose to your girl!\f
That’s the weather brought to you
by Helena!
DP.360.0028:
Newscaster: We bring you this
news flash.\f
We’ve just received word that hordes
of [0100,0001] have been spotted in\r
the vicinity of [0104,0000].\f
If you’ve ever had the desire to be
surrounded by [0100,0001]...\f
Or wished to make a team full of
[0100,0001]...\f
Or wanted to wear them on your
head...\f
If you’re a true viva [0100,0001]
sort of Trainer...\f
Then make your way to
[0104,0000] right now!\f
That concludes this news flash.
DP.360.0030:
Ace Trainer: Hey, how are y’all doing,
Poké fans?\f
Thanks for tuning in to the Matchup
Channel!\f
Hey, fans, you’ve all used
[010F,0000]-type moves, right?\f
They’re super effective against
[010F,0001]-type Pokémon!\f
I’m telling you, the effect is like
seeing me in person!\f
That’s all for today, but don’t
forget to send me fan mail!\f
Give it to your bird Pokémon, then
set them free into the skies!\f
A chance encounter with greatness--
that’s me--is always possible!\f
See you again!
DP.360.0031:
Ace Trainer: Hey, how are y’all doing,
Poké fans?\f
Thanks for tuning in to the Matchup
Channel!\f
Hey, fans, you’ve all used
[010F,0000]-type moves, right?\f
They’re, like, not much better than
OK against [010F,0001]-type Pokémon!\f
They’re plain, like other Ace
Trainers are plain next to me.\f
That’s all for today, but don’t
forget to send me fan mail!\f
Give it to your bird Pokémon, then
set them free into the skies!\f
A chance encounter with greatness--
that’s me--is always possible!\f
See you again!
DP.360.0032:
Ace Trainer: Hey, how are y’all doing,
Poké fans?\f
Thanks for tuning in to the Matchup
Channel!\f
Hey, fans, you’ve all used
[010F,0000]-type moves, right?\f
They’re not very effective against
[010F,0001]-type Pokémon!\f
In fact, they’re wimpy like the many
wannabe Trainers that copy me!\f
That’s all for today, but don’t
forget to send me fan mail!\f
Give it to your bird Pokémon, then
set them free into the skies!\f
A chance encounter with greatness--
that’s me--is always possible!\f
See you again!
DP.360.0033:
Ace Trainer: Hey, how are y’all doing,
Poké fans?\f
Thanks for tuning in to the Matchup
Channel!\f
Hey, fans, you’ve all used
[010F,0000]-type moves, right?\f
They’re absolutely hopeless against
[010F,0001]-type Pokémon!\f
It’s a totally wasted effort, like the
way other Trainers try to mess\r
with me out of jealousy!\f
That’s all for today, but don’t
forget to send me fan mail!\f
Give it to your bird Pokémon, then
set them free into the skies!\f
A chance encounter with greatness--
that’s me--is always possible!\f
See you again!
DP.360.0035:
Berry Prof: Say hey, hey, how are
your Berries growing today?\f
Say hey, Berry fans, how goes
it today? OK?\f
Enough fooling about, let me roll it
right out, today’s Berry Lookout!\f
[0104,0000] is where I went,
hoping to find Berries by scent!\f
And there I found them!\f
My journey was rewarded!\f
My heart raced!
I felt enfevered!\f
But there I left them.
As gifts for you!\f
Say hey! Check your Berries today!
Thanks, everyone!
DP.360.0036:
Berry Prof: Say hey, hey, how do
your Berries grow today?\f
Say hey, Berry fans, how goes
it today? OK?\f
Enough fooling around, let me lay it
right out, today’s Berry Lookout!\f
[0104,0000] is where I went,
hoping to find Berries by scent!\f
But!
No Berries there were...\f
Still, there is hope!
For flowers were in bloom.\f
The aroma tickled and danced in
my nose!\f
Flowers bloomed in the cockles of
my heart!\f
I grew heartened, for the Berries
they will come, they will come!\f
Say hey! Check your Berries today!
Thanks, everyone!
DP.360.0037:
Berry Prof: Say hey, hey, how do
your Berries grow today?\f
Say hey, Berry fans, how goes
it today? OK?\f
Enough fooling around, let me lay it
right out, today’s Berry Lookout!\f
[0104,0000] is where I went,
hoping to find Berries by scent!\f
But!
No Berries there were...\f
Still, all is not lost!\f
The plant’s stem grows thick, and
with it my hope!\f
I surely look forward to seeing
its flowers in bloom!\f
Say hey! Check your Berries today!
Thanks, everyone!
DP.360.0038:
Berry Prof: Say hey, hey, how do
your Berries grow today?\f
Say hey, Berry fans, how goes
it today? OK?\f
Enough fooling around, let me lay it
right out, today’s Berry Lookout!\f
[0104,0000] is where I went,
hoping to find Berries by scent!\f
But!
No Berries there were...\f
Still, all is not lost!\f
The plant’s sprout has burst up!
It’s a celebration of life!\f
All of you watching, don’t trample
it under!\f
Say hey! Check your Berries today!
Thanks, everyone!
DP.360.0039:
Berry Prof: Say hey, hey, how do
your Berries grow today?\f
Say hey, Berry fans, how goes
it today? OK?\f
Enough fooling around, let me lay it
right out, today’s Berry Lookout!\f
[0104,0000] is where I went,
hoping to find Berries by scent!\f
But!
No Berries there were...\f
My time had been wasted!
I had traveled in vain!\f
My excitement shriveled and withered
away...\f
But it must mean someone’s happy
for having picked Berries!\f
Say hey! Plant your Berries today!
Thanks, everyone!
DP.360.0042:
Researcher: It’s the Pokémon
Research Corner!\f
Today, we’ll examine a wild Pokémon
live in the field.\f
Ah, here we go, a wild [0100,0000]
conveniently just came along...\f
Oh? It’s holding something!
Let’s roll on up and take a look!\f
Hi, there!
Can I take a look...\f
Yow! Ouch!
It scratched my finger!\f
But OK, we now know that wild
[0100,0000] have the possibility\r
of holding the item [0108,0001].\f
Thank you, [0100,0000], here’s your
[0108,0001] back...\f
Aiyaaah! Ow, ow, ow!
Scratched me again!\f
As usual, I got a Pokémon riled up
at me!\f
It’s time for me to go!
So long!
DP.360.0050:
Reporter: I’m bringing you this report
from the second floor of Jubilife TV.\f
I’m here to examine a recently added
photo titled “[011C,0001]”\r
which belongs to [0103,0000].\f
Oh, is this it here?
Let’s see...\f
The title “[011C,0001]” does
sound fitting for this photo...\f
But one can’t help but think perhaps
a better title could have been found.\f
All controversy aside, it’s certainly
worth seeing. Please do visit!
